message:
test(codec): add tiered scrollback roundtrip tests for PDU encode/decode

Verify PaneTieredScrollbackStatus survives codec roundtrip in both
GetPaneRenderChangesResponse and GetPaneRenderableDimensionsResponse.
Also applies rustfmt formatting to existing test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
